entry.title: New: BILL050(26) (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO FUNDS.

Repeals Chapter 6, Article 59, Revised Ordinances of Honolulu 2021 (“Land Conservation Fund”). Takes effect on July 1, 2028, and provides that all ordinances and resolutions, or portions thereof, that are in conflict or inconsistent with this bill are also repealed.

Latest action: Passed first reading.

View on the council site
